raw.official description: Teleporting with Translocator while below half health initiates passive health regeneration.
Hack can be used while invisible, successful hacks increase the duration of stealth by 3 seconds.
raw.ability details:
* Sombra becomes revealed when hacking enemy players, but no longer exits stealth.
* Stealth's duration increases when hacking enemies, healthpacks, and deployables.
* Allows Sombra to remain in stealth indefinitely if used in conjunction with Translocator.

raw.official description: Hacked health packs provide up to 75 overhealth to Sombra.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Reign of Talon Season 1''
* Starts to decay at a rate of 10 overhealth per second once the duration ends.
* Health packs can be picked up while full health 
* Picking up a Health Pack while Sombra is at maximum overhealth resets the degeneration timer.
* Picking up a health pack to gain overhealth only consumes it.
* The perk was originally called "Hacky Packy", but it was renamed to "Adept Hacker" before its release in Season 18. Then at around Season 18 Mid Season, it was renamed to Healthy Hacker, its current name

raw.official description: Hacked health packs grant allies 25% movement speed and 50 overhealth for 4 seconds.
You detect enemy ultimate abilities on nameplates, and deal more damage to hacked enemies.
raw.ability details:
* Deal 20% more damage to hacked targets.
* Can benefit from Hack effect applied by another friendly Sombra.
* When an enemy has their ultimate, this icon [[File:Ultimate Ready.png|24x24px]] shows up above them.

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted
raw.official description: Hack's silence duration is increased by 100%, but its range is decreased by 15%.
raw.ability details: * Replaced by [[File:Viral_Replication.png|sub|link=Sombra#Viral Replication|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Viral Replication|Viral Replication]] in Season 16.

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: When out of combat, become invisible and move faster.
raw.ability details: * Stealth starts on a shorter 1 second cooldown upon respawning. * Sombra automatically turns [[invisible]] 3.5 seconds after not taking an offensive action, receiving damage or being affected by crowd control. ** Entering stealth has a fade out period, during which Sombra is still partially visible. ** Following actions count as "offensive": activating primary fire, [[quick melee]], [[File:Ability Sombra Virus.png|sub|link=Sombra#Virus|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Virus|Virus]] or [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]] or using [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]] on an enemy Hero. *** Excluding Hack, these actions will immediately take Sombra out of stealth upon the key press, but they will not be initiated, unless the key is held or pressed again once Sombra has completely faded in. **** There is no fade in delay if stealth is broken within 0.75 seconds of entering stealth. **** Pressing the Hack button does not interrupt stealth. Only when Hack targets an enemy hero it will immediately take Sombra out of stealth. Additionally, Hack's cast time starts immediately and does not have to wait for Sombra to fade in. ** Using [[File:Ability Sombra Translocator.png|sub|link=Sombra#Translocator|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Translocator|Translocator]] or hacking a [[health pack]] or [[object]] do not interrupt stealth. * If an enemy [[hero]] comes within 4 meters of Sombra, they can "detect" Sombra. When detected, Sombra will remain stealthed, but is visible to that specific enemy hero. This is indicated by a "DETECTED!" message, shown at the top of Sombra's screen. ** [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]] cannot detect Sombra. * Sombra becomes "revealed" if she uses [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]] on an [[object]] or [[health pack]] or can be seen through abilities, such as [[File:Ability-hanzo2.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|Sonic Arrow]] or [[File:Ability-widowmaker4.png|sub|link=Widowmaker#Infra-Sight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Widowmaker#Infra-Sight|Infra-Sight]]. When revealed, Sombra will remain in stealth, but Sombra is visible to the entire enemy team. This is indicated by a "REVEALED" message shown at the top of Sombra's screen. * [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted enemy abilities and following auto-targeting attacks cannot target Sombra, unless she is detected by the player or revealed: [[File:Ability-mccree4.png|sub|link=Cassidy#Deadeye|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Cassidy#Deadeye|Deadeye]], [[File:icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|sub|link=Soldier: 76#Tactical Visor|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Soldier: 76#Tactical Visor|Tactical Visor]], [[File:Ability Moira Biotic Grasp_Alt fire.png|middle|link=Moira#Biotic Grasp Alt Fire|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Biotic Grasp Alt Fire|Biotic Grasp Alt Fire]] and [[File:Ability Moira Biotic Orb.png|sub|link=Moira#Biotic Orb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Biotic Orb|Biotic Orb]] (damage). ** Zenyatta's Orb of Discord will remain attached to Sombra while she is stealthed, as long as there are no obstacles between them, but it will not indicate her location. * Following enemy [[object]]s cannot auto-target Sombra, unless she has been revealed: [[File:Ability-symmetra2.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Sentry Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Sentry Turret|Sentry Turret]] or [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]]. * [[Torbjörn]]'s [[File:Ability-torbjorn3.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|Turret]] can only attack Sombra when she is out of stealth. * Sombra can activate [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] while stealthed. * Sombra cannot contest map [[objective]]s while stealthed. ** If Sombra enters the objective area stealthed, she will remain in stealth. ** If Sombra enters the objective area unstealthed, the cooldown of stealth will be paused until she leaves the objective area. *** The remaining cooldown will be set to 1 second if it was less than that. * Sound effect and voiceover distance is 15 meters. * Stealth's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

raw.official description: Virus' cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds when an enemy affected by Virus is eliminated.
raw.ability details: * Replaced by [[File:Encrypted_Upload.png|sub|link=Sombra#Encrypted Upload|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Encrypted Upload|Encrypted Upload]] in Season 16.

raw.official description: Hitting a hacked enemy with Virus spreads Virus to enemies within 8 meters.
raw.ability details:
* The spreading Virus only deals the over time portion of the damage.
* If the Virus spreads to another hero that is hacked, it will not trigger another spread.

abilities.name: White Hat

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted
raw.official description: Hack can be used on allies to restore 100 health over 2 seconds.
raw.heal: 100 over 2 seconds
raw.ability details: * ''Removed in Season 18.'' * Hack cannot be interrupted by getting damaged when used on allies. * Hacking allies does increase Stealth's duration if [[File:Encrypted_Upload.png|sub|link=Sombra#Encrypted Upload|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Encrypted Upload|Encrypted Upload]] is picked as a minor perk.

heal.raw: 100 over 2 seconds

abilities.name: Virus

raw.official description: Infect enemies with a projectile that deals damage over time. Virus damages hacked targets at a faster rate.
raw.damage:
35 (impact, normal)
70 (impact, hacked)
75 (DoT)
raw.ability details: * Virus's impact damage on hacked targets is doubled and the damage over time is dealt at double rate if the target is hacked. ** The total DoT amount remains the same whether the target is hacked or not or if they become hacked or lose the debuff after the ability has impacted, but the rate and duration of the effect are adjusted accordingly. ** The hacked effect does not have to be from the same Sombra that applied the Virus. For example, hitting Virus on a target hacked by Echo that has copied Sombra also triggers the benefits. * [[Objects]] can also be damaged, and if they are hackable, they can also be damaged faster. * Virus cannot [[headshot]]. However, eliminating a hacked hero with the impact damage shows in the kill feed as a critical hit. * Impact damage is affected by [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] but damage over time is not. * Virus does not benefit from Opportunist, but does from Hack.

35 (impact, normal)
70 (impact, hacked)
75 (DoT)

abilities.name: Translocator
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Throw a beacon and teleport to it. Become stealthed for a short duration after teleporting.
raw.ability details: * Cooldown for Translocator begins upon teleporting to it. * Once thrown, the translocator activates immediately upon colliding with terrain or a terrain-like object, such as [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]], or after 0.25 seconds have passed. ** This results in effective range of 18 meters along the trajectory. ** Translocator destroys breakables, such as fences, while in flight and does not activate upon hitting them. * The translocator cannot be damaged, and it does not collide with heroes or objects. * Being [[stunned]], [[knocked down]], [[hacked]], [[rooted]] or [[hindered]] prevents Translocator from being used. ** If Sombra becomes is affected by aforementioned effects (including [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|Chain Hook]] and [[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|Charge]]) or caught in [[File:Ability-zarya4.png|sub|link=Zarya#Graviton Surge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Graviton Surge|Graviton Surge]] while the Translocator is in air, the teleport will go through and the negative effects will be removed. ** If Sombra becomes affected by Sigma's [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]], the teleport goes through but its effects will not be removed. * Translocator cannot be used while pulled by [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]]. ** If Sombra was pulled while Translocator is in air, she will still teleport to it, interrupting the pull. * Sombra becomes [[phased out]] for 0.4 seconds after teleporting, making her immune to damage as well as removing and preventing most negative effects. * After teleporting, Sombra gains stealth after a 0.25 second fade out period. Once the duration ends or stealth is interrupted it has a 0.3 second fade in period. Sombra is partially visible while fading in/out. * Stealth is interrupted if Sombra uses primary fire, [[quick melee]], [[File:Ability Sombra Virus.png|sub|link=Sombra#Virus|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Virus|Virus]], [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]], or tries to [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|hack]] an enemy hero. ** These actions will immediately cause Sombra to start to fade in upon the key press, but they will not be initiated, unless the key is held or pressed again once Sombra has completely faded in. *** There is no fade in delay if stealth is broken within 0.75 seconds of entering stealth. * Sombra becomes "revealed" if she uses [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]], takes damage or can be seen through abilities, such as [[File:Ability-hanzo2.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|Sonic Arrow]] or [[File:Ability-widowmaker4.png|sub|link=Widowmaker#Infra-Sight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Widowmaker#Infra-Sight|Infra-Sight]]. When revealed, Sombra will remain in stealth, but Sombra is visible to the entire enemy team. This is indicated by a "REVEALED" message shown at the top of Sombra's screen. ** Taking damage reveals Sombra for 1.3 seconds. * If an enemy [[hero]] comes within 4 meters of Sombra, they can "detect" Sombra. When detected, Sombra will remain stealthed, but is visible to that specific enemy hero. This is indicated by a "DETECTED!" message, shown at the top of Sombra's screen. ** [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]] cannot detect Sombra. * [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted enemy abilities and following auto-targeting attacks cannot target Sombra, unless she is detected by the player or revealed: [[File:Ability-mccree4.png|sub|link=Cassidy#Deadeye|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Cassidy#Deadeye|Deadeye]], [[File:icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|sub|link=Soldier: 76#Tactical Visor|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Soldier: 76#Tactical Visor|Tactical Visor]], [[File:Ability Moira Biotic Grasp_Alt fire.png|middle|link=Moira#Biotic Grasp Alt Fire|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Biotic Grasp Alt Fire|Biotic Grasp Alt Fire]] and [[File:Ability Moira Biotic Orb.png|sub|link=Moira#Biotic Orb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Biotic Orb|Biotic Orb]] (damage). ** Zenyatta's Orb of Discord will remain attached to Sombra while she is stealthed, as long as there are no obstacles between them, but it will not indicate her location. However, Translocator's teleportation will remove the effect if it was applied before it. * Following enemy [[object]]s cannot auto-target Sombra, unless she has been revealed: [[File:Ability-symmetra2.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Sentry Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Sentry Turret|Sentry Turret]] or [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]]. * [[Torbjörn]]'s [[File:Ability-torbjorn3.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|Turret]] can only attack Sombra when she is out of stealth. * Sombra can activate [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] while stealthed. * Sombra cannot contest map [[objective]]s while stealthed. ** If Sombra enters the objective area stealthed, she will remain in stealth. * Stealth's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap. * Movement speed buff is tied to the stealth effect. The buff is retained while detected or revealed, but ends if stealth is interrupted.

abilities.name: Translocator (old)
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Throw a beacon, then press E again to teleport to it. Press F to remove it.
raw.cast time:
instantly for throw + 0.5 s. recovery
0.4 s. invulnerability (translocating)
raw.ability details: * Reworked in Season 7 of ''[[Overwatch 2]]''. * Cooldown for Translocator begins immediately upon throwing it, or when it is destroyed. * Can be manually destroyed using the Interact key. Destroying it this way does not reset the cooldown. * The translocator can neither be thrown or activated while [[rooted]] or [[hindered]]. * The Translocator bounces off walls but not slopes. * Translocator can be placed on and lifted by [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] if the latter was deployed first. ** If a translocator is placed on Petal Platform and the platform is destroyed, the translocator is destroyed as well. * Sombra has a very brief moment of invincibility upon translocating, removing most negative effects from Sombra. ** Removes damage over time effects, such as [[File:Ability-ashe2.png|sub|link=Ashe#Dynamite|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#Dynamite|Dynamite]]. ** Removes attached objects, such as [[File:Magnetic_Grenade.png|sub|link=Cassidy#Magnetic Grenade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Cassidy#Magnetic Grenade|Magnetic Grenade]] and [[File:Ability-hanzo2.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|Sonic Arrow]].

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.fire rate: 20 shots/s
raw.reload time: 1.2 seconds animation
raw.dps:
Damage per second:
160 while firing (114.3 overall w/reload)
192 while firing w/ opportunist

* Damage per second:
**160 while firing (114.3 overall w/reload)
**192 while firing w/ opportunist
* Maximum spread is reached after 6 shots.
* If primary fire is released there is a 0.16 seconds recovery period before it can be used again.

Damage per second:

abilities.name: Hack

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted
raw.official description: Hold to hack. Hacked enemies cannot use abilities and can be seen through walls. Hacked health packs spawn faster and can't be used by enemies. Taking damage interrupts the hack attempt.
raw.duration:
8 seconds (reveal, heroes)
1.0 seconds (ability disable, heroes)
45 seconds (health packs)
10 seconds (disable, objects)
3 seconds (disable, B.O.B.)
raw.ability details: * Hack can target [[heroes]], [[health pack]]s and most enemy [[objects]]. * Sombra can see the ult status of hacked enemies (above their healthbar). * Hack goes on a shorter 3 second cooldown if a non-player unit is hacked or if Hack is interrupted by taking damage. ** If Hack is interrupted without taking any damage, it does not go on cooldown. * Hack cannot be used on an enemy that is already hacked. This refers to the duration of the reveal debuff rather than the ability lock. * Using Hack on enemy objects or health packs doesn't end Stealth, but instead reveals Sombra to nearby enemies. ** Using Hack on enemy heroes will exit Stealth, however. * An unobstructed line of sight to the target is required for the entirety of the startup animation. [[Barrier]]s break line of sight instantly. Walls also break line of sight, but there is a brief grace period where Hack can continue. * Hacked heroes cannot activate their [[Ability|abilities]] for 1 second and are revealed to Sombra's team for 8 seconds. ** A "HACKED" text will appear to the players while their abilities are locked. ** Hack disables all hero-specific [[movement]] [[Passive ability|passive abilities]]. Heroes that have a higher base movement speed keep their increased speed. ** Hack completely turns off [[Lúcio]]'s [[File:Ability-Lucio2.png|sub|link=Lúcio#Crossfade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lúcio#Crossfade|Crossfade]], retracts [[Sigma]]'s [[File:Abilities-sigma2.png|sub|link=Sigma#Experimental Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Experimental Barrier|Experimental Barrier]] and [[Wrecking Ball]] exits [[File:Roll.png|sub|link=Wrecking Ball#Roll|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Wrecking Ball#Roll|Roll]]. ** Hack does not affect [[weapon]]s nor passive abilities tied to weapons. ** Hacked heroes display a check mark above their head if they have their [[ultimate ability]] available. * Hacked [[Health Pack]]s respawn four times faster — 2.5 seconds for small Health Packs, 3.75 seconds for mega Health Packs — and can be seen through walls to all allies within 30 meters. Hacked Health Packs cannot be used by the enemy team unless their area effected by [[File:Perk_SonicDisruption.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Sonic Disruption|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Sonic Disruption|Sonic Disruption]]. ** Healing from hacked Health Packs is credited to Sombra in the scoreboard, but she does not gain any [[ultimate charge]] from it. ** Health Packs cannot be hacked before the round starts. ** Sombra cannot hack Health Packs that have already been hacked by an enemy Sombra or Hanzo with [[File:Perk_SonicDisruption.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Sonic Disruption|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Sonic Disruption|Sonic Disruption]]. * Following [[object]]s can be hacked, either disabling them briefly or completely destroying them. ** Torbjörn's [[File:Ability-torbjorn3.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|Turret]] and Illari's [[File:Healing_pylon_icon.png|sub|link=Illari#Healing Pylon|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Illari#Healing Pylon|Healing Pylon]] are disabled for 10 seconds when hacked. ** Ashe's [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]] is disabled for 3 seconds when hacked. ** Hacking Lifeweaver's [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] prevents it from activating or causes it to fall on ground, destroying it, if already activated. ** Hacking Baptiste's [[File:Baptiste-ability3.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Immortality Field|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Immortality Field|Immortality Field]] completely destroys it. ** Some objects, such as [[Symmetra]]'s [[File:Ability-symmetra2.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Sentry Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Sentry Turret|Sentry Turrets]] or [[File:Ability-symmetra4.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Teleporter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Teleporter|Teleporter]], cannot be targeted by Hack, but can still be hacked with [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]], refer to [[Objects#List of objects]] for a complete list. * Non-heroes that are hacked have a skull above them that drains over time. This represents the duration of the hack. * Hacked can be completely removed by Zarya's [[File:Ability-zarya3.png|sub|link=Zarya#Projected Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Projected Barrier|Particle/Projected Barrier]], Zenyatta's [[File:Ability-zenyatta4.png|sub|link=Zenyatta#Transcendence|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Transcendence|Transcendence]] or abilities that grant [[phased out]] status, such as [[File:Ability-reaper2.png|sub|link=Reaper#Wraith Form|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reaper#Wraith Form|Wraith Form]] and [[File:Protection_Suzu_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Protection Suzu|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Protection Suzu|Protection Suzu]]. Becoming phased out while casting hack also prevents it from finishing. * Becoming [[Unstoppable]], such as through [[File:Overrun_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Overrun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Overrun|Overrun]] or [[File:Ability Orisa Fortify.png|sub|link=Orisa#Fortify|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Fortify|Fortify]], prevents Hack's ability lockdown, but not its reveal or [[File:Ability Sombra Opportunist.png|sub|link=Sombra#Opportunist|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Opportunist|Opportunist]] damage boosting.

abilities.name: EMP
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Deal damage to all nearby enemies based on their current health, hacking them and destroying barriers around you.
raw.duration:
8 seconds (reveal, heroes)
3 seconds (ability disable, heroes)
45 seconds (health packs)
10 seconds (disable, objects)
raw.radius: 15 meters
raw.ability details: * EMP is line of sight blocked by terrain. ** Mei's [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]] blocks line of sight to enemies behind it. ** Lifeweaver's [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]] and [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] do not block EMP. * EMP completely destroys ''all'' barriers, including [[File:Photon Barrier.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Photon Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Photon Barrier|Photon Barrier]], Baptiste's [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]], and Domina's [[File:ULT Panopticon.png|sub|link=Domina#Panopticon|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Domina#Panopticon|Panopticon]]. ** If [[Zarya]] projects a barrier on a target with shields (e.g. herself), the barrier protects the health and the player will not be hacked. Zarya will gain the [[File:Passive-Zarya.png|sub|link=Zarya#Energy|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Energy|Energy]] from the damage absorbed. * In addition to the [[objects]] that can be hacked by [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]], EMP also hacks Symmetra's [[File:Ability-symmetra2.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Sentry Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Sentry Turret|Sentry Turrets]] and [[File:Ability-symmetra4.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Teleporter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Teleporter|Teleporter]], Mei's [[File:Ability-mei4.png|sub|link=Mei#Blizzard|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Blizzard|Blizzard]] and Wrecking Ball's [[File:Minefield.png|sub|link=Wrecking Ball#Minefield|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Wrecking Ball#Minefield|Proximity Mines]], disabling them for 10 seconds. They must be within Sombra's line of sight, ignoring barriers. Refer to [[Objects#List of objects]] for a complete list. ** Some objects, such as [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]], cannot be hacked but may still be damaged by EMP. ** Mei's [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]] is completely unaffected by EMP. * Unlike other [[Ultimate ability|ultimate abilities]] Sombra alerts her entire team regardless of distance from her that she had used her EMP. This is done by a radio transmission sounding "EMP activated." * Sombra can start gaining ultimate charge after 5 seconds of using EMP. * Sombra receives a small vertical boost from activating EMP.
